comment.text: This key displays the amount of available credits to the user. It's used as the title within a balance card component, likely on a payments or settings page. Translators should ensure the wording accurately reflects a user's remaining credit balance.

usage.context:
<div className={styles.balanceSection}>
 <div className={styles.balanceCard}>
 <BalanceAmount
 amount={aiServiceBalance}
 currency={aiServiceCodeCurrency}
 title={t("AvailableCredits")}
 onRefresh={onRefresh}
 isRefreshing={isRefreshing}
 />
 
 <Button
